title: Miner's Delight
body:
📖 About:
Miner's delight is an addon for Farmer's Delight that adds culinary content focused on Caves, including a new and mysterious meat-flavored crop that grows in caves!

Experiment with new and unique ingredients to prepare delicious or unusual meals to share with your friends!!

This Addon Mod for Farmer's Delight focuses on making gastronomic content more accessible to mining!!!

📦 Beta Version

  • This mod is currently under development, so issues and instabilities may occur. If you'd like to play, keep in mind:
  • Backup your saves often;
  • Make sure everything is working before adding it to a modpack;
  • Report any issues you find to our Github!! It helps us a lot!
  • If you want to support me you can donate in my KO-FI :D
  • If you want to support the programmer visit they Patreon!!!
     

🎂 Features (1.20+):

◉  Copper pot: This new cooking utensil is somewhat smaller than the conventional pot and is specialized for quick lunches.
stews and soups prepared in this pot should be served in copper cups...
(these cups can contain half a portion but are consumed twice as fast, they are very useful for sharing or having quick meal breaks)
◉  Copper cup: Similar to the bucket but cannot contain lava.

🍄 New ingredients:

◉  Cave carrots: New Crop, you can find it in the wild in caves- It is a vegan alternative if you are looking for the taste of meat. don't hesitate to pick it and replant it in your garden!!!
◉  Gossypium: New Flower, It blooms on wild cave carrots, you can use it to make string.
◉  Bats: New Snack easy to get in the caves... With a knife in hand and a bit of luck you will get some! Useful for preparing fast foods~
◉  Silverfish eggs: Difficult to obtain without the right tool, although they are useful for spreading the plague, many people like to taste them in sophisticated dishes.
◉  Arthropods: New Insect meat, if really want protein and you have a knife this is the best option in the caves!! don't be fooled by its appearance as it is a favorite of Gourmets...
◉  Squids: New Fishing, if you are lucky enough to have a rod or find it swimming unwary you can feast!!! be sure to finish it with a knife to avoid damaging the meat so much...

📦 New Blocks:

◉  Sticky basket: work like the FD basket, but objects inside it can only be removed with hoppers and entities in contact with it can only jump half a block.
use it to donation baskets (cannot be looted >:D!!) or a simple entity trap
(when waterlogged, this loses they adhesion allowing the entity trapped inside to escape) 

⚠️ Features (1.19):

 Features:

◉  Copper pot: This new cooking utensil is somewhat smaller than the conventional pot (no feasts) but cooks slightly faster.
soups and stews prepared in this pot can only be served in a copper cup to maintain their "flavor" (All foods served in cups give the haste effect).
◉  Copper cup: Similar to the bucket but cannot contain lava.


◉  Wild Cave carrots: an crop found in the wild in caves, if you harvest them you can get Gossypium and if you are lucky some cave carrots (be the first to grow it!!)
◉  Gossypium: a flower, u can be used to make String

◉ New drops:
 -Bats: 0-1 wings, if they are killed with a knife they always drop 2 wings
-Squids: 0-3 tentacles, if they are killed with a knife they always drop 1 squid (glow squid will drop its corresponding item)
-Fishing: now the player can fish for squid and glow squid

◉  Sticky basket: work like the FD basket, but objects inside it can only be removed with hoppers and entities in contact with it can only jump half a block. use it to donation baskets (cannot be looted >:D!!) or a simple entity trap.
◉  Silverfish eggs: rare drop from broken infected blocks, can be obtained by killing silverfish but it is even rarer they can also be used to infect blocks.


📝 FAQ:

  • Can I use this mod in my modpack?
      Yeah! you can use this mod in your modpack, but please use the modrinth download and do not rehost the files.

  • Will this mod eventually be ported to Fabric/other loaders?

  No, unfortunately not. This mod will only be maintained for Forge, unless someone else wishes to port it. (please contact us first)

BananaBread Lover Club Discord for questions and whatnot~
